headline: UBS Maintains Neutral on Molson Coors Beverage, Lowers Price Target to $40
summary: UBS  analyst Peter Grom   maintains Molson Coors Beverage (NYSE:TAP) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $46 to $40.
